reviews.review_description: this is game is bad. It will not let me play and it feels kicking me out.

Heya! I produce music for the game, so this review might be biased.

Swing! Personally is one of the best gorilla locomotion games out there.
Ilove swing I’ve been playing since day 2

If there are people online to chat with, or it's just you on your own, swing offers a fun and enjoyable experience regardless. It has a great community, maps, game modes, and more! It's got a really goofy style to it, with toon shaders, sound effects, and awesome music!! There's so much to explore and do, and more to come as well! If you haven't played it yet, give it a try :D

This game is so fun and really underrated I'm trying to get all my friends to play this game to make it more popular so lots of people can have lots of fun and you're not just in a lone Lobby all the time :)
